items.title: Kingston Flemings didn't shoot well in the first half.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Kingston Flemings didn't shoot well in the first half. 

He also did some very encouraging things. 

Broke the paint consistently. 

5 assists, 0 turnovers. 

And got up 3 threes in 12 minutes.

(defense has a long way to go, but that's the baseline for a 19-year-old guard)

items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Rough scoring half for Kingston Flemings (3 points, 1/7 FGs)

But he did have five assists without a turnover

Rough playmaking half for Darryn Peterson (no assists, 3 turnovers)

But he's been aggressive as a scorer (10 points, two and-ones)

items.title: Hawks down 6 at the half in Salt Lake City despite shooting only 7-22 on twos.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks down 6 at the half in Salt Lake City despite shooting only 7-22 on twos. 

All 10 players have scored. 

No one has more than 7 points. 

5 assists for Flemings.

5 rebounds, 2 steals for Ejiofor.

items.title: If you missed it, every trip to the free throw line in Summer League will be only 1 attempt.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
If you missed it, every trip to the free throw line in Summer League will be only 1 attempt.

If it's traditionally a 2-shot foul, the attempt will be for 2 points.

If it's traditionally a 3-shot foul, the attempt will be for 3 points.
